description_long: This is a black ceramic cup with a glossy finish and a large, rounded handle. The exterior is adorned with bold, red Italian text in a decorative script, creating a striking visual contrast against the dark background. The cup has a classic cylindrical shape with a slightly tapered base and a wide, open mouth. The interior is white, providing a clean and bright contrast to the dark exterior. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The cup's surface is smooth and hard, typical of glazed ceramic kitchenware.
description: A black ceramic cup with red decorative Italian text, a white interior, and a large rounded handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red Italian text prominently on the black surface and the full handle on the right.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the handle's attachment and partial text wrapping around the cup.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle fully visible and no text or decoration on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly plain black surface with a hint of red text at the edge.
